[Albiruni has misread the word fsra^rt as frnffift: meaning
Siva's tree, instead of wfcl^cz is the reading adopted by Utpala.
He interprets it as 'sfccrera" seen as soon it has risen. He

Note the direction in which a comet's crest is bent or curved
as well as to which it is projected and the asterism that is touched
by it. All the countries situated in those quarters as well as those
coming under the particular asterism in question will be overrun
by a mighty monarch of matchless valour, and the territories,
enjoyed previously by other kings, brought under control, even
